name: Rhodes Island
description: A crisis-response organization focused on Oripathy treatment, conflict mediation, and field operations.

name: Reunion Movement
description: A militant movement born from Infected oppression, later splintering through tragedy and radicalization.

name: Lungmen
description: A wealthy, guarded city with powerful civil administration, underworld influence, and strategic importance.

name: Penguin Logistics
description: A chaotic but effective courier company known for dangerous delivery work and colorful operators.

name: Blacksteel Worldwide
description: A security contractor with professional training, field discipline, and international deployments.

name: Rhine Lab
description: A high-end research organization tied to experimental science, ethics conflicts, and Originium technology.

name: Laterano
description: The Sankta homeland, famous for law, faith, firearms, and strict social order.

name: Kazdel
description: A fractured nation shaped by war, mercenary companies, royal claims, and Sarkaz history.

name: Kazimierz
description: A nation where chivalry, corporate spectacle, sportsmanship, and political power collide.

name: Leithanien
description: A nation strongly associated with music, nobility, high culture, and advanced Originium Arts.

name: Ursus
description: A vast empire marked by military power, harsh social conditions, and deep conflict around the Infected.

name: Victoria
description: A powerful state with aristocratic politics, military tradition, and major succession conflicts.

name: Yan
description: A vast eastern nation with long history, regional authorities, and powerful cultural traditions.

name: Iberia
description: A sea-facing nation scarred by catastrophe, isolation, and fear of oceanic threats.

name: Kjerag
description: A remote mountain country shaped by faith, clans, trade, and outside pressure.

name: Sargon
description: A vast desert region of tribes, city-states, survival cultures, and ancient legacies.

name: Siracusa
description: A society shaped by families, vendettas, organized crime, and personal loyalty.

name: Ægir
description: A mysterious seaborn civilization tied to advanced knowledge and deep-sea threats.

name: Independent
description: Operators who work outside formal political, corporate, or national structures.
